nasb.text: “Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, ‘Go and say to the men of Judah and the inhabitants of Jerusalem, “Will you not receive instruction by listening to My words?” declares the Lord.

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel: Go and say to the people of Judah and the inhabitants of Jerusalem, Will you not receive instruction and listen to my words? declares the Lord.

cnv.text: “萬軍之耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：你去對猶大人和耶路撒冷的居民說：‘你們不接受管教，不聽我的話嗎？’這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: “这是以色列的上帝——万军之耶和华的话，你去把我的话告诉犹大人和耶路撒冷的居民，‘耶和华说，你们要听从我的教导。
